review_notes: v001: pilot template (arkady.ts) applied to the lev card. Shortest of cast, permanent stoop baked into every pose (standing torso carries a -3px shoulder lean eased to 0 at the hip, plus head offset well forward of the chest line); seated torso center shifted 2px forward of the arkady baseline (CX=24 vs 26) per card 'perched forward of seat center by 2 px'. Head is a hand-authored 13x15 ASCII map: bald dome (flesh_2 highlight) with an untidy horseshoe fringe (soot_4/soot_3) at the back/sides only, prominent ear as a genuine silhouette protrusion at the occiput edge, large round glasses rendered as two distinct cyan_0 lenses with a soot_0 bridge (glasses never removed in any pose — base map bakes them in), short fleshy upturned nose jutting at the front edge, soft round small chin. Skin planes flesh_1 base BALANCED with generous flesh_0 shadow (ruddy-warm, not inverted like arkady) with flesh_2 glints on crown/nose/cheek per card. Jacket worn permanently open (never buttoned per card) with a visible cream/cream_1 shirt strip the full torso length; sleeves rendered bare (flesh) from elbow to wrist in every pose (rolled to the elbow, never rolled down); chest-pocket screwdriver (soot_4 + red_1) and a jacket pocket bulge (olive_0) stamped on the torso. Signature pose draws a small held pocket radio (soot_2 body, soot_4 dial, soot_0 antenna stub) at the near hand raised to the ear — a personal held item baked into this one pose, not a table-anchored prop. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts on all 11 PNGs (9 poses + sheet + silhouette); inspected at 8x/16x.
